text: Step 3: validation, hints, top-3 orientation + live rebalance in modal
description: In ConnectionDetailsModal: clamp to MAX_SHARE (90%) with hint copy ("100% isn't possible while other aims also support this — capped at 90%"); skip the % field entirely when isSoleContributor(S,L) (weight=1, 100%); show top-3 contributing siblings by share; live "after" preview of rebalanced shares by re-running value-calculation.ts. S = Σ sibling weights on parent, L = parent loopWeight.

status.comment: Added live top-3 contributor preview (parent outflow shares = weight/(S+L+w), computed locally) + 'this connection' row in ConnectionDetailsModal, with scoped styles. vue-tsc clean.
